mapper.select: SELECT tc.id, tc.task_id as taskId, tc.student_id as studentId, tc.student_name as studentName, u.student_no as studentNo, tc.status, tc.score, tc.complete_time as completeTime, tc.create_time as createTime FROM task_completion tc LEFT JOIN user_info u ON tc.student_id = u.id WHERE tc.deleted = 0 AND tc.task_id = #{taskId} ORDER BY tc.status DESC, tc.complete_time DESC
